job_summary: A Clinical Quality Manager oversees quality systems in clinical research to ensure compliance, efficiency, and continuous improvement.
key_responsibilities: Develop and implement quality management systems (QMS)
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Manage audits, inspections, and CAPA processes
Train staff on quality standards and procedures
career_path: Quality Manager → Senior Manager → Director of Quality
skills_required: develop and implement quality management systems (qms)
manage audits, inspections, and capa processes
train staff on quality standards and procedures
